title: Chaala Bagundi
desc: Sivaji and Vamsi share an unbreakable bond while taking care of their father's business. However, things change when Vamsi marries Seetha who tries to separate them in whichever way possible.

title: Varasudochhadu
desc: Bose meets Raghu, who is going to die soon, at a hospital and agrees to take up his disguise and go to his village. Upon reaching there, he realises that Raghu's family is after his property.

title: Sakutumba Saparivaara Sametham
desc: Disgusted by the habits and actions of his family members, a young man decides to remain a bachelor. However, when he meets a girl with irresistible traits, he is forced to rethink his decision.

title: Telugu Hits
desc: A compilation of some of the most trending Telugu hits composed by famous artists is played back-to-back to enthrall the audience.

title: My Choice
desc: The host talks to various celebrities from the Telugu movie industry who share their experiences of working in the movies.

title: Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs, performed by gifted artists and musicians, is played in rapid succession.

title: Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs, performed by gifted artists and musicians, is played in rapid succession.

title: Yoga Based Programme
desc: Yoga experts showcase various postures and meditation methods, offering practical tools for managing everyday stress and improving wellbeing.

title: Madhurimalu
desc: A chef shares some kitchen secrets, simple dessert recipes and demonstrates how to whip up mouthwatering treats in an easy-to-understand manner.

title: Illalu
desc: In search of luxury and money, Kalpana abandons her husband, Kiran, and son and marries a rich old man. After Kiran remarries, Kalpana realises her mistake and returns to get her husband and son back.

title: Chenchu Lakshmi
desc: Disguised as Narasimha, Lord Vishnu ventures into the forests after defeating the demon Hiranyakashipu. However, his life takes a turn after he falls in love with the daughter of a tribal chieftain.

title: Pelli Pandiri
desc: Prakash and Govind, inseparable childhood friends raised under one roof, share an unbreakable bond. However, their friendship faces the ultimate test when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Betting Bangaraju
desc: A man falls in love with a girl who has three other suitors already queued. Divya invites all of them home for a week so that her elders can decide whom to pick.

title: Rudhramadevi
desc: Fearing that his people will not accept a female successor, a king raises his daughter, Rudrama Devi, like a boy. Years later, when a threat looms over the kingdom, she sets out to fight her foes.

title: Bhale Ramudu
desc: Ramudu, an innocent man, begins work at a hotel owned by Raja. When Bhujangam, an evil man, plans to kill Raja, Ramudu decides to save him.
